payload.content: I'll create the required files and test them. Let me start by creating main.py and calculator.py.
payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_ff857f5c2d9d4a36a081ac7e', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "import csv\\n\\n# Generate sales_data.csv\\ndata = [\\n    [\\"product\\", \\"quantity\\", \\"price\\"],\\n    [\\"Widget\\", 10, 25.00],\\n    [\\"Gadget\\", 5, 50.00],\\n    [\\"Gizmo\\", 3, 30.00]\\n]\\n\\nwith open(\\"sales_data.csv\\", \\"w\\", newline=\\"\\") as f:\\n    writer = csv.writer(f)\\n    writer.writerows(data)\\n\\n# Calculate total revenue\\ntotal_revenue = sum(row[1] * row[2] for row in data[1:])\\nprint(f\\"Total revenue: ${total_revenue:.2f}\\")", "filename": "main.py"}'), TYPE='function'), ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_d9eee022bee94ed4a0cae9fc', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "expr = input(\\"Enter expression: \\")\\nresult = eval(expr)\\nprint(result)", "filename": "calculator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
